zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Bradshaw於1243年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾維斯特利時，他的父親Uchtred de Bradshaw42歲，母親Isabel de Lorraine29歲。他於1276年與Margaret Aspull在英國英格蘭藍卡爾彭寧頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1293年3月在英國英格蘭哈普爾彭寧頓享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Bradshaw于1243年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾維斯特利时，他的父亲Uchtred de Bradshaw42岁，母亲Isabel de Lorraine29岁。他于1276年与Margaret Aspull在英国英格兰藍卡爾彭寧頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1293年3月在英国英格兰哈普爾彭寧頓享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bradshaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Bradshaw in Lancashire, Yorkshire, and Derbyshire, from Old English brād ‘broad’ + sceaga ‘thicket’.

variants.name: Brayshaw
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Bradshaw  , reflecting the local Yorkshire pronunciation.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Bradshaw was born in 1243, in Westleigh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Uchtred de Bradshaw, was 42 and his mother, Isabel de Lorraine, was 29. He married Margaret Aspull in 1276, in Pennington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about March 1293, in Pennington, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Bradshaw est né en 1243, à Westleigh, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Uchtred de Bradshaw, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Lorraine, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Aspull en 1276, à Pennington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ mars 1293, à Pennington, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Bradshaw 1243 in Westleigh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Uchtred de Bradshaw 42 und seine Mutter Isabel de Lorraine 29. Er hat 1276 in Pennington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Aspull geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um März 1293 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Pennington, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Bradshaw è nato il nel 1243 nel Westleigh, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Uchtred de Bradshaw, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Lorraine, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Aspull nel 1276, nel Pennington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa marzo 1293, nel Pennington, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Bradshawが1243年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウエストレイグで生まれた時，父Uchtred de Bradshawは42歳，母Isabel de Lorraineは29歳であった。1276年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアペニントンでMargaret Aspullと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1293年3月にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアペニントンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Bradshaw(이)가 1243년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 웨스틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Uchtred de Bradshaw(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Lorraine(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 펜잉턴에서 Margaret Aspull(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1293년 3월 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 펜잉턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Bradshaw nasceu em 1243, em Westleigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Uchtred de Bradshaw, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Lorraine, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Aspull em 1276, em Pennington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente março de 1293, em Pennington, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Bradshaw родился в 1243 г. в местности вестлиг, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Uchtred de Bradshaw было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Lorraine, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Aspull в 1276 г. в местности пеннингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около марта 1293 г. в местности пеннингтон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Bradshaw nació en 1243, en Westleigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Uchtred de Bradshaw, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Isabel de Lorraine, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret Aspull en 1276, en Pennington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente marzo de 1293, en Pennington, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
